title: Hadestown
tagline: A retelling of the Greek myth of Orpheus and Eurydice.
overview: Orpheus travels to the underworld to retrieve his love Eurydice from Hadestown.

songs.name: Road to Hell
songs.note: Hermes introduces the world and the story.

songs.name: Any Way the Wind Blows
songs.note: We meet Eurydice and see her struggle to survive.

title: Heathers
overview: Veronica joins the most powerful clique at school and gets caught in a dangerous relationship with J.D.

songs.name: Beautiful
songs.note: Introduces the social hierarchy of Westerberg High.

songs.name: Candy Store
songs.note: The Heathers recruit Veronica into their group.

title: Mamma Mia!
tagline: An ABBA musical about love and family.
overview: Sophie invites three possible fathers to her wedding hoping to discover which one is her real dad.

songs.name: Money, Money, Money
songs.note: Donna reflects on her financial struggles.

songs.name: Lay All Your Love On Me
songs.note: A fun romantic duet between Sophie and Sky.
